description: Noise variants for E3 experiment - Robustness to noise in requirements. All variants contain the same core logical content, with increasing levels of noise.

noise_types.slight: Minor ambiguities: synonyms, passive voice, slightly imprecise wording - but same logical content
noise_types.heavy: Major noise: contradictions added, irrelevant statements, vague qualifiers - but core logical content preserved

reference_model.name: order_management
reference_model.description: Order management system with status tracking
reference_model.requirements:
Order management system:
- All new orders are in pending state
- All pending orders can be processed
- All processing orders can be completed
- No cancelled order is in processing state
- Some orders are priority
- Not all pending orders are priority

variants.name: order_management_clean
variants.requirements:
Order management system:
- All new orders are in pending state
- All pending orders can be processed
- All processing orders can be completed
- No cancelled order is in processing state
- Some orders are priority
- Not all pending orders are priority
variants.noise_description: No noise applied - clear A/E/I/O statements

variants.name: order_management_slight
variants.description: Synonyms and passive voice, same logical content
variants.requirements:
System for managing orders:
- Every fresh order starts in pending status
- Pending orders are able to move to processing
- Orders being processed can become completed
- Cancelled orders are never in the processing state
- Certain orders have priority status
- Not every pending order is marked as priority
variants.noise_description: Synonyms (fresh/new, certain/some), passive voice, but all logical relations preserved

variants.name: order_management_heavy
variants.description: Noise added but core logic preserved
variants.requirements:
Order system requirements (v2.1):
- The system should be fast and responsive
- All new orders are generally in pending state
- Pending orders can usually be moved to processing
- Processing orders can typically become completed
- Note: The UI allows users to view order status
- No cancelled order should be in processing state
- Some orders have priority (important for SLA)
- Not all pending orders are priority ones
- Database optimization is recommended
- The system integrates with payment processing
variants.noise_description: Vague qualifiers (generally, usually, typically), irrelevant info (UI, database, payment), but all A/E/I/O statements preserved

reference_model.name: hotel_reservation
reference_model.description: Hotel room reservation and status management
reference_model.requirements:
Hotel reservation system:
- All premium rooms have a balcony
- No occupied room is available for reservation
- Some rooms have an ocean view
- Some rooms are not air-conditioned
- All available rooms can become reserved
- All reserved rooms can become occupied
- All occupied rooms require cleaning
- All cleaned rooms become available

variants.name: hotel_reservation_clean
variants.requirements:

- All premium rooms have a balcony
- No occupied room is available for reservation
- Some rooms have an ocean view

- All available rooms can become reserved
- All reserved rooms can become occupied
- All occupied rooms require cleaning
- All cleaned rooms become available

variants.name: hotel_reservation_slight
variants.description: Synonyms and rephrasing, same logical content
variants.requirements:
Hotel booking system:
- Every premium tier room comes with a balcony
- Occupied rooms are not available for booking
- Certain rooms offer an ocean view
- Not every room has air conditioning
- Available rooms are able to be reserved
- Reserved rooms may become occupied
- Occupied rooms need to be cleaned
- Cleaned rooms return to available status

variants.name: hotel_reservation_heavy
variants.description: Noise added but core logic preserved
variants.requirements:
Hotel room management (internal doc):
- The hotel has a beautiful lobby and restaurant
- All premium rooms have a balcony
- No occupied room is available for reservation
- Some rooms feature an ocean view (great for guests)
- Some rooms are not air-conditioned (older wing)
- Staff training is important for guest satisfaction
- All available rooms can become reserved
- All reserved rooms can become occupied
- All occupied rooms require cleaning after checkout
- The booking system integrates with third-party platforms
- All cleaned rooms become available again
- WiFi is complimentary in all rooms
variants.noise_description: Irrelevant info (lobby, WiFi, staff training), parenthetical comments, but all A/E/I/O statements preserved exactly

reference_model.name: traffic_light
reference_model.requirements:
Traffic light control system:
- All active lights show exactly one color at a time
- No light shows red and green simultaneously
- Some intersections have pedestrian signals
- Not all lights have turn arrows
- All red lights can become green
- All green lights can become yellow
- All yellow lights can become red

variants.name: traffic_light_clean
variants.requirements:
Traffic light control system:
- All active lights show exactly one color at a time
- No light shows red and green simultaneously
- Some intersections have pedestrian signals
- Not all lights have turn arrows
- All red lights can become green
- All green lights can become yellow
- All yellow lights can become red
variants.noise_description: No noise applied - clear A/E/I/O statements

variants.name: traffic_light_slight
variants.description: Synonyms and rephrasing, same logical content
variants.requirements:
Traffic signal controller:
- Every active signal displays a single color
- Red and green are never shown at the same time
- Certain intersections include pedestrian crossing signals
- Not every light is equipped with turn arrows
- Red signals are able to change to green
- Green signals can transition to yellow
- Yellow signals return to red
variants.noise_description: Synonyms (signal/light, display/show), rephrasing, but all logical relations preserved

variants.name: traffic_light_heavy
variants.description: Noise added but core logic preserved
variants.requirements:
Traffic management system (spec v3):
- Modern LED technology is recommended for new installations
- All active lights show exactly one color at a time
- No light shows red and green simultaneously (safety critical)
- Some intersections have pedestrian signals
- Sensors can detect vehicle presence at intersections
- Not all lights have turn arrows
- All red lights can become green
- All green lights can become yellow
- All yellow lights can become red
- The control box should be weatherproof
- Camera integration is optional but recommended
variants.noise_description: Irrelevant technical details (LED, sensors, cameras, weatherproof), parenthetical notes, but all A/E/I/O statements preserved exactly
